arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan v Cagliari: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Rafael Leao could make his first start under new manager Sergio Conceicao in AC Milan's upcoming match against Cagliari. The Portuguese winger, who made a significant impact as a substitute in Milan's recent Super Cup triumph, has a strong record against the Sardinian side, having scored five league goals against them, including one in each of their last two encounters at San Siro. The post Serie A | Milan v Cagliari: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: AC Milan vs Cagliari at 20:45 CET
arts.sum: In the 2000s, Milan faced Cagliari at home 18 times in Serie A (46 goals scored, 11 conceded), winning on 17 occasions; against no other team have the Rossoneri achieved more successes at the San Siro in this period of the competition (17 also against Lazio). The Rossoneri, who returned home with the Supercup, will want to continue to do well in the league, where they have scored five points in their last five matches.
